message:
feat(ui): add mouse hover tracking on result rows

Wire ftui's MouseEventKind::Moved through the CassApp event pipeline to
track which result row the mouse is hovering over.  Hovered rows get a
subtle 8% lighten effect on their stripe background, giving a visual
affordance that helps users anticipate click targets.

- Add `Moved` variant to local `MouseEventKind` enum
- Map ftui `Mek::Moved` to `CassMsg::MouseEvent { kind: Moved }`
- Add `hovered_result: Option<usize>` field to CassApp state
- Handle hover in/out in mouse event dispatch (hit-test aware)
- Add `hovered: bool` field to `ResultItem` for per-row rendering
- Blend stripe background 8% toward white via `lerp_u8()` when hovered
- 2 new tests: hover state tracking, Moved variant existence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
